author: Max Rubin
name: LoopFullAttnRes + LoopQ + XSA
blurb: Leaderboard-format 10-minute / 16MB submission exploring recurrent weight tying with a prelude-core-coda layout, full attention residual history mixing, loop-specific learned depth queries, and exclusive self-attention in the recurrent core. Not a SOTA claim.
technique_summary: Prelude-core-coda recurrence + full attention residual history mixing + loop-query depth routing + exclusive self-attention + tied embeddings + int8 zlib serialization
reproducibility_notes: Stage canonical SP8192 data with: huggingface-cli download LightSpeedUp/parameter-golf-data --include "fineweb_sp8192/*" --local-dir /workspace/data. The canonical tokenizer from that export is included at tokenizers/fineweb_8192_bpe.model. Run train_gpt.py from this records folder with DATA_PATH=../../../data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp8192, TOKENIZER_PATH=./tokenizers/fineweb_8192_bpe.model, VOCAB_SIZE=8192, TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048, TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=524288, VAL_BATCH_SIZE=1048576, GRAD_ACCUM_STEPS=8, MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600, TORCH_COMPILE=1, and torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8.
